Book the AI Audit →
Interactive · 3 minutes · 10 questions

AI readiness scorecard.

A 10-question assessment that scores your organization on AI readiness across 5 dimensions: leadership, governance, tooling, workflows, and team capability. Get a tier (Laggard, Transitional, Competitive, or Leader) plus specific next steps based on your weakest pillar.

Dimension 1 · Leadership

How would you describe your CEO's personal AI use?

Dimension 1 · Leadership

Is there a named executive accountable for AI strategy?

Dimension 2 · Governance

Do you have a written AI usage policy?

Dimension 2 · Governance

What's your stance on client confidential data + AI?

Dimension 3 · Tooling

Which AI tools is the team using for serious work?

Dimension 3 · Tooling

Are you using shared Claude Projects (or ChatGPT GPTs) with team-level system prompts?

Dimension 4 · Workflows

Where does AI currently show up in daily team workflows?

Dimension 4 · Workflows

Can you point to specific measurable outcomes AI has produced in the last 90 days?

Dimension 5 · Team capability

Has your team gone through structured AI training (not just a single workshop)?

Dimension 5 · Team capability

Is AI fluency a hiring criterion now?

Competitive
Score: 30/40
